'''thafaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyiv|kyiv]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyiv|kyiv]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thafaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæfæjæth|thæfæjæth]] || [[word:thæfæjæj|thæfæjæj]] || [[word:thæfæjæsh|thæfæjæsh]] || [[word:thæfæjæ|thæfæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thafafajath|thafafajath]] || [[word:thafafajaj|thafafajaj]] || [[word:thafafajash|thafafajash]] || [[word:thafafaja|thafafaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafajath|thafajath]] || [[word:thafajaj|thafajaj]] || [[word:thafajash|thafajash]] || [[word:thafaja|thafaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafafjath|thafafjath]] || [[word:thafafjaj|thafafjaj]] || [[word:thafafjash|thafafjash]] || [[word:thafafjaf|thafafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thafajatha|thafajatha]] || [[word:thafajaja|thafajaja]] || [[word:thafajasha|thafajasha]] || [[word:thafajaka|thafajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thafajath|thafajath]] || [[word:thafajaj|thafajaj]] || [[word:thafajash|thafajash]] || [[word:thafaja|thafaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thafajathal|thafajathal]] || [[word:thafajajal|thafajajal]] || [[word:thafajashal|thafajashal]] || [[word:thafajakal|thafajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thafajathatha|thafajathatha]] || [[word:thafajajaja|thafajajaja]] || [[word:thafajashasha|thafajashasha]] || [[word:thafajaka|thafajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thafajathan|thafajathan]] || [[word:thafajajan|thafajajan]] || [[word:thafajashan|thafajashan]] || [[word:thafajakan|thafajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thafajathaoro|thafajathaoro]] || [[word:thafajajaoro|thafajajaoro]] || [[word:thafajashaoro|thafajashaoro]] || [[word:thafajakaoro|thafajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
